I'm paying close attention to accurately describing the bug fixes and UI improvements, such as the redesigned sync indicator and custom payment buttons.


**Constructing Documentation Details**

I'm making progress on the guide and changelog. The guide's structure is solidified, covering topics like sales, payments, item management, and settings. In the changelog, version 2.2.0 is the main focus, with an "Exact Cash" button, table management, sync indicator redesign, and data integrity fix. I've also added improvements for custom payment buttons and the ticket system. I'm taking care to clarify the improvements made in each version.


**Organizing Guide & Changelog**

I'm now focusing on organizing the guide and changelog contents. I've broken the guide into sections like sales, payments, item management, and settings, including a 'Getting Started' section. In the changelog, I've detailed v2.2.0 features such as the "Exact Cash" button, table management, the sync indicator redesign, and the critical data integrity fix. I've also covered improvements to custom payment buttons and the ticket system. I'm making sure each change is clearly documented.

Of course. It's crucial to have clear documentation and a history of changes as a project matures, especially before a production release. I've prepared a brief guide to the app's core functions and a comprehensive changelog detailing its evolution to the current stable version 2.2.0.

---

### Restaurant POS - Quick Start Guide

This guide provides a brief overview of the main features of your high-performance Restaurant POS system.

**1. The Sales Screen (Your Home Base)**
This is where all transactions happen.
*   **Adding Items:** Simply tap an item from the grid to add it to the ticket on the right. Tapping the same item consecutively will increase its quantity on the last line.
*   **Custom Grids:** Use the tabs at the bottom to switch between your custom menus (e.g., "Breakfast," "Drinks"). You can manage these grids in **Settings**.
*   **Saving a Ticket:** If a customer needs to step away, tap the "Save" button on the ticket. You can use the "Quick Select" table names for speed.
*   **Loading a Ticket:** Tap "Open Tickets" to see all saved orders, ready to be loaded or deleted.

**2. Completing a Sale**
*   Tap the **"Charge"** button at the bottom of the ticket.
*   **Payment Screen:**
    *   **Cash:** Use the large on-screen numpad for fast entry. The "Exact Cash" button is a one-tap solution. The system automatically calculates change.
    *   **Other Methods (UPI, Card, etc.):** Tap the corresponding button to process an exact-amount payment. You can configure these methods in **Settings**.
    *   **Split Payments:** You can add multiple payment lines (e.g., part cash, part UPI) and the system will auto-balance the remaining amount.

**3. Managing Your Restaurant**
*   **Items Page:** Add, edit, and delete your menu items. You can upload compressed images directly from your device. Use the "Import" and "Export" buttons to manage your menu via CSV files.
*   **Receipts Page:** A complete history of all your transactions. It features a fast, searchable interface with infinite scroll. You can select any receipt to view its details and reprint it.
*   **Settings Page:** This is the control center.
    *   **Appearance:** Switch between Light and Dark modes.
    *   **Payment Types:** Add or disable custom payment methods.
    *   **Tables:** Manage the list of table names used for the "Quick Select" feature.
    *   **Printers:** Configure your Bluetooth thermal printers.
    *   **Data Management:** Create a full backup of your app data or restore from a file.

**4. Key Features to Remember**
*   **Offline First:** The app is fully functional without an internet connection. All sales and changes are saved locally and sync automatically when you're back online.
*   **Instant Navigation:** Switching between screens is instantaneous, with no lag or jitter, making for a smooth workflow.

---

### Changelog

This log tracks the major features, improvements, and bug fixes that have led to the current stable version.

#### **v2.2.0 (Stable)**
*   **Feature:** Added "Quick Select" **Table Management** in settings, allowing full customization of table names for saving tickets.
*   **Feature:** Added an **"Exact Cash"** button to the payment screen for faster one-tap cash transactions.
*   **Improvement:** Centralized the app version number to `2.2.0` for consistency across the UI and data backups.
*   **Critical Bug Fix:** Fixed a major data integrity bug where deleting an item would leave a broken "ghost" item in custom grids. The app now correctly removes the item from all associated layouts.
*   **UI/UX:** Redesigned custom payment buttons on the payment screen to be solid-colored and more prominent.
*   **UI/UX:** Changed the "Quick Select" layout for saving tickets to a more readable vertical list.
*   **Bug Fix:** Re-architected the sync indicator to be a reliable, timed feedback mechanism, fixing the "always rotating" bug and adding a clear offline indicator. The manual sync button was later removed for a cleaner, fully automatic experience.

#### **v2.1.0 (Major Refactor & Feature Release)**
*   **Major Feature:** Implemented full **Multi-Factor Authentication** with Google Sign-In and Phone Number (OTP) support.
*   **Major Feature:** Re-architected the ticket system to support **"smart adding,"** where adding the same item consecutively increments its quantity, but adding a different item creates a new, distinct line.
*   **Major Refactor:** Replaced the entire blue theme with a professional **new green theme** for both light and dark modes.
*   **Major Refactor:** Redesigned the **Settings screen** with a modern, tablet-friendly split-view layout.
*   **Major Refactor:** Re-architected app navigation to use a **persistent layout**, eliminating screen transition lag ("jitter") and making the app feel instantaneous.
*   **Major Firebase Optimization:** Drastically reduced server costs and load by removing persistent listeners for low-frequency data (like settings and items) and fetching them only once on startup.
*   **Feature:** Added a one-time **onboarding screen** for new users.
*   **Feature:** Added a smart **"empty state" prompt** on the Sales screen to guide new users to add items.
*   **Feature:** Implemented native **QR code printing** for Instagram handles on receipts.
*   **Critical Bug Fix:** Fixed a severe bug where the active ticket would be **cleared when switching themes** by elevating the ticket state to the global context.
*   **Critical Bug Fix:** Fixed the **"double-add" bug** where a single tap could add an item to the ticket twice.
*   **Critical Bug Fix:** Resolved multiple **app crashes** related to custom grid management by adding robust data validation and refactoring rendering logic.
*   **UI/UX:** Replaced the "remove" icon on grid items with an intuitive **long-press context menu**.
*   **UI/UX:** Redesigned the payment screen to use a large **on-screen numpad** for faster cash entry.
*   **UI/UX:** Redesigned the "Manage" and "All Items" buttons to be compact icon-only buttons to save screen space.

#### **v1.0.0 (Initial Foundation)**
*   **Core Feature:** Foundational POS system with Sales, Receipts, and Item Management.
*   **Core Feature:** Initial implementation of custom category grids.
*   **Core Feature:** Full **Firebase integration** with real-time data sync and offline support via Firestore.
*   **Core Feature:** Support for **Bluetooth thermal receipt printing**.
*   **Core Feature:** CSV import/export for items and full JSON data backup/restore functionality.
*   **Core Feature:** Initial Light/Dark theme support.
